title: SQL: wrong results of shift with type casting
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_shift (id UInt64, value Nullable(Int64));
SELECT value << 6 FROM test_shift WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CAST(value AS Int64) << 8 FROM test_shift;
SELECT CAST(NULL AS Int64) << 32 FROM test_shift;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_shift WHERE value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Shift operation with type casting produces incorrect results
